tools.name: firecrawl_scrape
tools.description: Scrape content from a single URL with structured or markdown output.

formats.description: Requested output formats. Supports simple strings such as markdown or branding, or JSON format descriptors.

type.description: Structured format kind, such as json.

schema.description: JSON schema describing the desired extraction result.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only the main page content.

tools.name: firecrawl_batch_scrape
tools.description: Scrape multiple known URLs in one batch job.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only main content.

tools.name: firecrawl_check_batch_status
tools.description: Check the status of a Firecrawl batch scrape job.

tools.name: firecrawl_map
tools.description: Discover indexed URLs on a site.

tools.name: firecrawl_search
tools.description: Search the web and optionally scrape the returned results.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

scrapeOptions.description: Optional scrape settings to apply to returned results.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only main content.

tools.name: firecrawl_crawl
tools.description: Start an asynchronous crawl over a site or section.

url.description: Root URL or URL pattern to crawl.

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

allowExternalLinks.description: Whether external links may be followed.

deduplicateSimilarURLs.description: Whether similar URLs should be deduplicated.

tools.name: firecrawl_check_crawl_status
tools.description: Check the status of an asynchronous crawl job.

tools.name: firecrawl_extract
tools.description: Extract structured information from one or more pages.

schema.description: JSON schema describing the desired structured result.

allowExternalLinks.description: Whether extraction may follow external links.

enableWebSearch.description: Whether web search may be used as extra context.

includeSubdomains.description: Whether subdomains may be included during extraction.

tools.name: firecrawl_agent
tools.description: Run Firecrawl's asynchronous autonomous research agent.

prompt.description: Research prompt describing the data to gather.

urls.description: Optional URLs to focus the agent on.

schema.description: Optional JSON schema for structured output.

tools.name: firecrawl_agent_status
tools.description: Check the status of a Firecrawl agent job.

metadata.description: Web search, scraping, crawl, and extraction tools from Firecrawl.
notes: Cloud API requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY unless you point to a self-hosted FIRECRAWL_API_URL.
